name: skill-quality-scorer
tagline: TRACE+ six-dimension deterministic scorer for Agent Skills / 技能质量评分器：T-R-F-S-I-E 六维 30 子项
description: Deterministic TRACE+ quality scorer for Agent Skill packages (SKILL.md). Six dimensions T-R-F-S-I-E, 30 sub-items (0/1/2), merges TRACE, Extra08 good-skill reverse-rubric, skill-creator, and ClawHub meta-skills (skill-reviewer, skill-quality-audit). Runs static_audit.py v2 first; composite = round((T+R+F+S+I+E)×100/60, 1). 对现有 Skill 做 TRACE+ 全维确定性评分：先静态脚本、再 30 子项检查清单、公式算综合分，减少模型自由发挥。
author: Chris1Wang3
